title: Kayock Writer Foundation
message: Kayock Writer Foundation: KAYOCK WRITER FOUNDATION READY

module_plan.name: Story Forge
module_plan.purpose: Novels, short stories, scripts, CYOA, scene drafting, chapter planning, and narrative development.
module_plan.future_writes: Story project Markdown and JSON files only, after explicit user action.

module_plan.name: Poetry Studio
module_plan.purpose: Poem Creator and Poem Polisher for theme, emotion, poetic form, rhythm, imagery, line breaks, and preserving the writer voice.
module_plan.future_writes: Poetry drafts and polish reports only, after explicit user action.

module_plan.name: Codex
module_plan.purpose: Characters, lore, factions, artifacts, locations, prophecy, reader knowledge, author knowledge, and canon notes.
module_plan.future_writes: Codex entries only, after explicit user action.

module_plan.name: Timeline
module_plan.purpose: Book, chapter, scene, flashback, prophecy, and cross-series chronology.
module_plan.future_writes: Timeline records only, after explicit user action.

module_plan.name: Continuity
module_plan.purpose: Canon checks, contradiction tracking, unresolved setup/payoff tracking, and author memory.
module_plan.future_writes: Continuity reports only, after explicit user action.

module_plan.name: Mystery Tracker
module_plan.purpose: Unresolved mysteries, clues, reveals, prophecy fragments, and payoff status.
module_plan.future_writes: Mystery tracker records only, after explicit user action.

module_plan.name: Story Bible Export
module_plan.purpose: Export a readable project bible from Codex, Timeline, Continuity, and project notes.
module_plan.future_writes: Exported story-bible Markdown only, after explicit user action.

naming_decisions.decision: Rename Novel Forge to Kayock Writer as the main creative writing department.
naming_decisions.notes: Novel Forge becomes legacy/internal wording while Kayock Writer becomes the public department name.

naming_decisions.decision: Use Story Forge as the narrative-writing module inside Kayock Writer.
naming_decisions.notes: Story Forge covers novels, short stories, scripts, CYOA, narrative drafting, and scene/chapter work.

naming_decisions.decision: Add Poetry Studio with Poem Creator and Poem Polisher.
naming_decisions.notes: Poetry work supports creation and polishing while preserving the writer voice.

naming_decisions.decision: Keep Markdown as the long-term portable source of truth.
naming_decisions.notes: Future storage should remain portable, inspectable, and friendly to Obsidian or other tools.

naming_decisions.decision: Preserve Local Mode and Cloud Mode as a future provider toggle.
naming_decisions.notes: Local Mode for private canon/manuscripts; Cloud Mode for public-safe research and critique.

flagship_universe.title: Slipping into Darkness
flagship_universe.book_1: Anthony learns the prophecy; Kayock dies; Jokaya kills him; Anthony stops Jokaya; Anthony learns his ex has been turned.
flagship_universe.book_2: Anthony hunts the ex, learns who she has become, defeats her, discovers Jokaya sanctuary clues, follows Olmec/Croatoan/Crystal Skull threads.
flagship_universe.use: Demonstration universe for Codex, Timeline, Continuity, Mystery Tracker, and Story Bible export.

checks.message: Kayock Writer is the selected department name.
Core Kayock Writer module plan is present.

recommendations.title: Start Kayock Writer as the new creative writing foundation
recommendations.recommendation: Treat this as the beginning of v10.11.x. Keep Novel Forge as legacy wording while the interface transitions to Kayock Writer.

recommendations.title: Build Story Forge Shell next
recommendations.recommendation: Create a read-only Story Forge overview with project list, scene/chapter plan, and future explicit-save workflow.

recommendations.title: Add Poetry Studio after Story Forge shell
recommendations.recommendation: Add Poem Creator and Poem Polisher as separate cards after the writer foundation is stable.

recommendations.title: Do not auto-migrate Novel Forge files
recommendations.recommendation: Any rename, folder creation, or migration should be a later explicit approved action with preview and backup.
